name: Augusta Tullus
title: Dean of Lorehold (Order)
specialty: Order magic, historical law, political theory of ancient civilizations
personality: Precise, principled, and demanding of excellence. Dean Tullus believes that the patterns of history reveal universal laws, and that understanding those laws is a moral obligation. She can seem stern but is genuinely invested in her students' success.
playerSummary: The structured, principled side of Lorehold. She values discipline and historical scholarship. Students who demonstrate real dedication earn her genuine respect.

name: Plargg
title: Dean of Lorehold (Chaos)
specialty: Chaos magic, spirit summoning, hands-on field archaeology
personality: Boisterous, enthusiastic, and convinced that the best lessons come from doing things that might go slightly wrong. Plargg leads by example and his examples sometimes involve minor structural collapses.
playerSummary: The wild, adventurous side of Lorehold. Plargg wants students to learn by digging, summoning, and occasionally waking things they probably shouldn't.

name: Uvilda Mistcoiler
title: Dean of Prismari (Substance)
specialty: Foundational technique, elemental control, the craft underlying artistic magic
personality: Measured, technically precise, and quietly passionate about the difference between raw talent and developed craft. Uvilda believes that artistry must be built on a foundation of real skill.
playerSummary: The disciplined, craft-focused side of Prismari. She'll push you to develop real technique before letting inspiration run wild.

name: Nassari
title: Dean of Prismari (Perfection)
specialty: Artistic vision, transformative expression, perfecting the moment of creative breakthrough
personality: Volcanic, passionate, and demanding in the way that only someone who truly loves their art can be. Nassari is not satisfied with good — Nassari wants extraordinary.
playerSummary: The fiery, perfectionist side of Prismari. Nassari will challenge you to exceed what you thought possible — and be disappointed if you settle.

name: Kianne
title: Dean of Quandrix (Substance)
specialty: Mathematical patterns in living systems, fractal biology, nature-mathematics interface
personality: Warm but exacting. Kianne is one of those rare teachers who can make abstract mathematics feel like poetry. She sees wonder in equations and wants her students to find it too.
playerSummary: The nature-pattern, living-mathematics side of Quandrix. Kianne will help you see the equations that make a forest grow.

name: Imbraham
title: Dean of Quandrix (Theory)
specialty: Pure mathematical theory, dimensional geometry, abstract arcane structures
personality: Intensely theoretical and perhaps the most purely abstract thinker on faculty. Imbraham exists primarily in his own mind. Conversations with him may require recalibration afterward.
vibe: Abstract, intensely theoretical, slightly removed from practical reality
playerSummary: The pure theory side of Quandrix. Imbraham's classes will make your head hurt and your spells better.

name: Shaile Talonrook
title: Dean of Silverquill (Radiance)
specialty: Radiance magic, inspirational rhetoric, the light side of linguistic power
personality: Luminous, encouraging, and possessed of a genuine belief in the power of words to uplift. Talonrook is the warmest presence at Silverquill, though she is no less sharp for it.
playerSummary: The radiant, inspiring side of Silverquill. Talonrook will teach you how words can lift people up.

name: Embrose Lu
title: Dean of Silverquill (Shadow)
specialty: Shadow magic, rhetorical weaponry, the cutting edge of language
personality: Brilliant, cutting, and deliberately intimidating. Embrose believes that comfort makes you weak and that true mastery of language means being able to wound as precisely as you heal.
playerSummary: The shadow, cutting side of Silverquill. Embrose will sharpen your words until they can cut through anything — including your own excuses.

name: Lisette
title: Dean of Witherbloom (Wither)
specialty: Decay magic, the study of death as transformation, fungal and biological arcana
personality: Serene, occasionally morbid, and fascinated by endings. Lisette treats death with the same academic interest she gives to life. Students who find this unnerving are encouraged to sit with their discomfort.
vibe: Serene, academically interested in death, quietly unsettling
playerSummary: The decay and death side of Witherbloom. Lisette will teach you that endings are just a different kind of beginning.

name: Valentin
title: Dean of Witherbloom (Bloom)
specialty: Life magic, growth, healing, vitality and renewal
personality: Exuberant about life in all its forms. Valentin is the counterpoint to Lisette — where she studies endings, he celebrates beginnings. His energy is infectious.
playerSummary: The growth and life side of Witherbloom. Valentin's classes celebrate every form of vitality.

name: Mavinda Sharpbeak
title: Student Counselor
specialty: Student welfare, crisis counseling, magical wellbeing
personality: Patient, perceptive, and deeply committed to student welfare. Mavinda sees through most performances and is not fooled by 'fine.' Her office is always open.
playerSummary: The school counselor. She's seen everything and judges nothing. If something is wrong, she's the right person to talk to.

name: Brenneth Blackstone
title: Professor of Eloquent Verse
specialty: Poetry, bardic composition, the intersection of shadow and light in written form
personality: Passionate about language and somewhat theatrical about it. Brenneth makes every lecture feel like a performance.
playerSummary: Teaches poetry-magic at Silverquill. His classes are theatrical and demanding.

name: Verelda Lang
title: Professor of Arcano-Biological Studies
specialty: The intersection of biological and arcane pattern systems, creature-magic interfaces
personality: Endlessly curious about the living world and its relationship to magical theory. Her classes involve a great deal of interaction with live magical specimens.
playerSummary: Studies how magic and living creatures interact. Her classes are unpredictable and fascinating.
